negative_assertions: INV-P1a: RuleCandidate lowering PredicateStub üretir, ExecutablePredicateSet DEĞİL (PR33a)
PredicateStub boş değil — unresolved slots (Metric/Threshold/Scope/Comparator) + suggested templates taşır (structured uncertainty)
Cross-family translation (ConceptualIntent→PhysicalCode) PR33b'ye — sadece suggested_templates önerilir

notes: Faz 5a RuleCandidate → PredicateStub lowering fixture'ı. Rule 'coupling' keyword içerir → suggested_templates = [MetricThreshold, MetricDelta] ('coupling' + 'azalt'). completeness() = 1.0 - 4/4 = 0.0 (tüm slot'lar unresolved). Reason = MetricUnresolved. INV-P1a: ExecutablePredicateSet üretilmez; operator slot'ları PR33b'de bağlayacak. 'A rule is not a predicate. A predicate is a rule whose measurable slots have been bound.'
